ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who listed the property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the listing */,
  "neighbourhood_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood group where the listing is located */,
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific neighborhood where the listing is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the listing */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the listing */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of room being offered */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price per night for the listing */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for a booking */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews the listing has received */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews per month */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Number of listings the host has on the platform */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days the listing is available for booking in the next 365 days */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Any house rules or guidelines for guests */,
  "photos" TEXT /* URLs or paths to property photos */,
  "availability_7" INTEGER /* Number of days the listing is available in the next 7 days */,
  "availability_30" INTEGER /* Number of days the listing is available in the next 30 days */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the listing based on all reviews */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings for the listing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the listing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the listing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_neighbourhood_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_group_id") REFERENCES neighbourhood_groups ("neighbourhood_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_room_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_type_id") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_neighbourhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_id") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the host registered on the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the host account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the host */,
  "profile_photo" TEXT /* URL or path to the host's profile photo */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio of the host */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings the host has */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings across all the host's listings */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the host based on all reviews of their listings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the host registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the host's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhood_groups" (
  "neighbourhood_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood group */,
  "neighbourhood_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood group */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the neighborhood group is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood group */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of listings in the neighborhood group */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings in the neighborhood group */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings in the neighborhood group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the neighborhood group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the neighborhood group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighbourhood_groups_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city center */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of listings in the city */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings in the city */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings in the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the city record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the state is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the state center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the state center */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of listings in the state */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings in the state */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings in the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the country center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the country center */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of listings in the country */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings in the country */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings in the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the country record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "neighbourhood_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood group where the neighborhood is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of listings in the neighborhood */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings in the neighborhood */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings in the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the neighborhood was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the neighborhood was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighbourhoods_neighbourhood_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_group_id") REFERENCES neighbourhood_groups ("neighbourhood_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "room_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the room type (e.g., Private room, Entire home/apt, Shared room) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the room type can accommodate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the room type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the room type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the user */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful by other users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "profile_photo" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile photo */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings the user has made */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the user based on all reviews they have written */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being booked */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "guests_count" INTEGER /* Number of guests in the booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL or path to an icon representing the amenity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the amenity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the amenity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_amenities" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id", "amenity_id")
)
